items.title: What Guests Say
items.summary: A selection of comments from guests who have taken part in Finbarre Snarey’s interview projects, including Tarot Interviews and Tarot DMs. “This interview format is so accessible, I think it’s genius” - Lucy Rose, The Lamb “By far the most dynamic interview I have ever…
items.content_html:
A selection of comments from guests who have taken part in Finbarre Snarey’s interview projects, including Tarot Interviews and Tarot DMs.

“This interview format is so accessible, I think it’s genius” - Lucy Rose, The Lamb

“By far the most dynamic interview I have ever done”  - Amy Twigg, Spoilt Creatures

“A really brilliant format” - Emma van Straaten, This Immaculate Body

“A lot of fun” - Sacha Coward, Queer as Folklore

“I have so enjoyed our conversation!” - Joanne Harris, Chocolat
